events.title: high blood pressure
events.event_summary: Problem-oriented bundle for high blood pressure.
supporting_evidence: The patient's blood pressure was as high as 170 over 90.
planned_actions: The doctor wants the patient to keep a record of their blood pressures for their next visit.
The clinician requested the patient to record their blood pressures.
care_context: The patient measures blood pressure at home.
The patient reports feeling high blood pressure.
The patient has noticed they no longer see their blood pressures.
The patient reports headaches when their blood pressure gets really high.
The patient is using an electronic arm blood pressure recorder.
The patient is taking carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day.

key_slots.temporal_profile: current, since the pandemic, when, recent, next visit, future, twice daily, daily
